name: wiki-toc-sidebar
description: Sticky right-rail sidebar listing article headings (H2/H3). Active section highlighted via IntersectionObserver. Collapses to an inline toggle on compact viewports.
html:
Contents

  1. {{section-title}}
    1. {{subsection-title}}

variants.name: mobile
variants.description: Inline collapsible toggle above article body; <details>/<summary> pattern.

aria: <nav aria-label='Table of contents'>. Active section link gets aria-current='true' (updated via IntersectionObserver JS). Sublist items indented visually with padding-left; nesting conveyed by <ol> inside <li> (no extra ARIA needed).
open_questions: Confirm whether IntersectionObserver threshold should be 0.1 (section enters viewport) or 0.5 (section majority visible) — affects feel at scroll boundaries.
